collection_boundary: deployment root identity must come from operator enrollment material
attestation must be supplied by hardware/KMS/HSM or external attester, not generated by this collector
operator trust policy must be supplied and signed outside the collector
collector can observe local manifest and output custody path
collector can bind an adapter conformance report produced by the adapter/conformance kit
collector can observe time source freshness and measurement window
collector can bind redaction evaluator output
derived replay consumes prior gate outputs
collector can bind confidence report produced from captured telemetry
control-arm/covariate material must be supplied by experiment owner
collector can bind threshold replay output from telemetry counters
derived boundary consumes threshold, security, and planner outputs
operator must supply final claim-to-evidence traceability material
